2: 3:F0 ← {(s a, v) : (s, a, v) F, v V, (s′, a′, s) ! F}. no dependencies, can be directly flattened
4:
F ←F U{F 0}.

if s' S then 7:
8:Fs′ ← F0 ∪ {(s a s′ a′, v′) : (s′, a′, v′) F }. flatten nesting of s′
9: end ifF ← F ∪ FLATTEN(Fs′).
end for
10: 11: return F
12: end procedure
